summary: This source is a PubMed abstract for a narrative review co-authored by Meir Stampfer. It highlights how the Nurses' Health Studies (NHSs) used validated dietary questionnaires and biomarkers over 40 years to identify dietary determinants of chronic diseases and inform evidence-based nutritional policies. Because it is a brief abstract, it does not contain Stampfer's personal frameworks, mental models, or direct quotes.
